name: Eggre Battle Armor
description: Notes This item was available during the 2018 Easter’s Event as a Tinkerer Daily Quest in exchange for 40 Golden Eggs. As of Easter 2020, the price was lowered to 20 Eggs.
effects: On Ability Use: Deals a burst of 500 damage to enemies within 5 sqrs and poison them for 1,000 damage over 5 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds
